ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pitchers" (
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitcher */,
  "pitcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the pitcher */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the pitcher */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the pitcher */,
  "era" REAL /* Earned run average (ERA) */,
  "whip" REAL /* Walks plus hits per inning pitched (WHIP) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the pitcher in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the pitcher in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Pitcher's handedness (left or right) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the pitcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team of the game */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team of the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team's score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team's score */,
  "game_length" TEXT /* Length of the game in hours and minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pitching_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pitching statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher the statistic belongs to */,
  "ip" REAL /* Innings pitched */,
  "h" INTEGER /* Hits allowed */,
  "r" INTEGER /* Runs allowed */,
  "er" INTEGER /* Earned runs allowed */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* Walks allowed */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Strikeouts */,
  "hr" INTEGER /* Home runs allowed */,
  "pitches" INTEGER /* Total pitches thrown */,
  "strikes" INTEGER /* Total strikes thrown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pitching_stats_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitchers ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, catcher, first baseman) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Player's handedness (left or right) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_pitchers" (
  "game_pitcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-pitcher combination */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the pitcher pitched in */,
  "pitcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pitcher */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which the pitcher appeared in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_pitcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_pitchers_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_pitchers_pitcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("pitcher_id") REFERENCES pitchers ("pitcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_seasons" (
  "game_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-season combination */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_seasons_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's tenure on the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's tenure on the team (null if still on the team) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
